G

GameController - Class in com.example.battleship.controller
Main controller for the Battleship gameplay view.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.controller.GameController
 
GameManager - Class in com.example.battleship.game
Manages the state and turn-based flow of a Battleship match.
GameManager(String) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.game.GameManager
Constructs a new GameManager instance for a player with the given nickname.
GamePersistenceException - Exception in com.example.battleship.persistence
Custom exception class for handling errors that occur during game state persistence operations.
GamePersistenceException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.example.battleship.persistence.GamePersistenceException
Constructs a new GamePersistenceException with a detailed message and root cause.
GameSaver - Class in com.example.battleship.persistence
Utility class for managing game persistence operations in Battleship.
GameSaver() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.persistence.GameSaver
 
GameSession - Class in com.example.battleship.game
Singleton class managing global game sessions and persistence operations in Battleship.
getBoard() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Board
Gets an unmodifiable map of all board coordinates and cells.
getBoard() - Method in interface com.example.battleship.model.players.IPlayer
Gets the game board associated with this player.
getBoard() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.players.Player
Gets the game board belonging to this player.
getCell(Coordinate) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Board
Retrieves the cell object at a given coordinate.
getCells() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Ship
Gets an unmodifiable view of the cells occupied by this ship.
getCellState() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Cell
Gets the current state of this cell.
getCellState() - Method in exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.RepeatedShotException
Gets the cell state at the attempted shooting coordinate.
getCol() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Coordinate
Gets the zero-indexed column position.
getCol() - Method in exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.InvalidCoordinateException
Gets the invalid column index that caused the exception.
getCoordinate() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Cell
Gets the coordinate of this cell.
getCurrentGameManager() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Gets the current active game manager instance.
getFleet() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Board
Gets the fleet attached to this board.
getHuman() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameManager
Gets the human player instance.
getHumanPlayer() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Gets the current human player instance from active game manager.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Retrieves the thread-safe singleton instance of GameSession.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.SceneManager
Retrieves the global static instance of the SceneManager.
getMachine() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameManager
Gets the machine (AI) player instance.
getNickname() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameManager
Gets the player's nickname.
getOrientation() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Ship
Gets the placement orientation of the ship.
getPlacedShipsCount() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.players.HumanPlayer
Gets the total count of ships currently placed on the player's board.
getRemainingShipsCount() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Fleet
Calculates the number of ships that remain afloat in the fleet.
getRevealedSunkenShips() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameManager
Gets the set of enemy ships that have already been visually revealed as sunk.
getRow() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Coordinate
Gets the zero-indexed row position.
getRow() - Method in exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.InvalidCoordinateException
Gets the invalid row index that caused the exception.
getSaveFile() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Gets the file path location for binary match saves.
getShip() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Cell
Gets the ship occupying this cell, if present.
getShips() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Fleet
Gets the list of ships currently in this fleet.
getSize() - Method in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.ShipType
Gets the length of the ship in grid cells.
getSize() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Ship
Gets the expected length of the ship in grid cells.
getSizeCells() - Method in exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.InvalidShipSizeException
Gets the actual number of cells provided.
getSizeShip() - Method in exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.InvalidShipSizeException
Gets the expected size of the ship in grid cells.
getStandardComposition() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.model.Fleet
Generates a standard list of 10 ship types conforming to the game's default fleet composition.
getSummaryFile() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Gets the file path location for summary match text files.
getSunkShipsCount() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Fleet
Calculates the number of ships in the fleet that have been completely sunk.
getSymbol() - Method in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.CellState
Gets the text symbol representation of the cell state.
getSymbol() - Method in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.Orientation
Gets the text symbol representation of the orientation.
getSymbol() - Method in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.ShootingMode
Gets the text symbol representation of the shooting mode.
Gradients - Class in com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util
Utility factory for constructing pre-configured JavaFX LinearGradient paints.
